arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers' class Celtic answer after being told England look down on Scottish football
arts.sum: Now in his second spell at Celtic Park, Rodgers has successfully negotiated the Parkhead club out of the Champions League group stage and is also preparing the Bhoys to face Aston Villa . Brendan Rodgers says the pressure of managing Celtic is unrivalled in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Leverkusen signs midfielder Emiliano Buendia on loan from Aston Villa
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen has signed Argentine offensive midfielder Emiliano Buendia on loan from Aston Villa to compensate for the injured Martin Terrier. Aston Villa said the player signed a contract extension before joining Leverkusen on loan.

arts.ttl: Sondre Orjasaeter responds to 'cool' Celtic transfer links
arts.sum: Sondre Orjasaeter has responded to reports linking him with Celtic.

arts.ttl: PSV Eindhoven vs Liverpool - Champions League: Live score, team news and updates as the Reds look to advance with a perfect record plus updates from Girona vs Arsenal and Aston Villa vs Celtic
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest scores and updates as Liverpool look to progress with a perfect record, plus updates from Girona vs Arsenal and Aston Villa vs Celtic.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Aston Villa ‘furious’ after what Arsenal have done with Ollie Watkins bid
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that Aston Villa are ‘furious’ after Arsenal launched a bid for Ollie Watkins. The Gunners have been in pursuit of...

arts.ttl: Why it will take Villa time to achieve Emery's real Champions League aim
arts.sum: Former Aston Villa midfielder Thomas Hitzlsperger explains why it will take time for them to achieve regular Champions League football.

arts.ttl: Arsenal plan next move after £60m Ollie Watkins bid rejected as five-man wishlist emerges
arts.sum: Arsenal are set to return to the table with a new bid for Ollie Watkins before Monday's transfer deadline and are also interested in Bayern Munich winger Mathys Tel

arts.ttl: Podcast: Champions League preview before Aston Villa v Celtic
arts.sum: We preview Celtic’s visit to Aston Villa in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Michael Stewart has 'got a feeling' Celtic are about to replace Kyogo Furuhashi, namechecks player
arts.sum: However, Michael Stewart has said that he feels Celtic are ‘pretty confident’ about replacing Kyogo and namechecks one player who has long been linked to the club. “Kyogo is 30 years old now,” continued Stewart, “He wants another challenge, all of a sudden you’re thinking about Celtic 18 months ago when Brendan Rodgers came back in and the disaster they had in the transfer window, to now what they’ve started to do.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers issues Celtic response to Sondre Orjasaeter transfer link
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers has insisted he is "not aware" of any Celtic transfer bid for Sarpsborg winger Sondre Orjasaeter.
